creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
gpsman upgrade from 6.4.1 to 6.4.2 included migration of Web
	site to Sourceforge, but I neglected to update pkg-descr to
	mention that in my previous upgrade patch.

	As this has no effect on the operation of gpsman itself, I
	don't believe it warrants any change to the version string
	for the port itself -- there's no point in re-installing the
	port ofr this change.

How-To-Repeat: 	Note that astro/gpsman/pkg-descr WWW lines still refers to
	http://www.ncc.up.pt/gpsman/, which is not where gpsman-6.4.2
	is.
